title: Blood in the streets
relevance_summary: Market crash due to overleveraged users and flash loans

prevention.rule: Block any tx that borrows via flash loan and immediately liquidates positions

monitoring_rules: BLOCK FLASHLOAN_BORROW -> LIQUIDATE_POSITIONS in single tx
summary: The market crashed due to overleveraged users who used flash loans to increase their liquidation ratios. Aave's flash loan feature was exploited, leading to significant losses. A guard could have blocked such transactions to prevent further damage.
